confirm_notes: Seam diff: 0 CRITICAL / 0 HIGH / 0 MEDIUM against CT 2.3.1.0 #901 -- boundary-only patch, no code seam moved.

RESOLVE was done offline via scripts.pkg module-presence (EU 2.3.0.1 #892 vs CT 2.3.1.0 #901) + packed gui-part art; module-presence catches moved/removed symbols but not signature drift -- the mod absorbs arity drift with variadic (*args) _onLoading wrappers.
Prior CT live CONFIRM (garage): widget mounted with live data; hangar presenter _onLoading patches applied; tank-switch re-armed the widget. OpenWG 1.1.6 loaded without init-terminate.
COMPATIBILITY STAMPED '2.3.1.0' (release) but only CT 2.3.1.0 #901 was available to pre-test against -- re-verify against the EU/global 2.3.1.0 release build once it ships, before publishing.
MSA soft-dep load failure on CT -- see vendor_refresh.

DEFERRED live: in-battle overlay mount + post-battle re-arm was NOT confirmed (CT servers down); all battle seams resolve unchanged, but drive an actual battle on the release client before publishing.

pointer_changes.detail: LOCAL dev deploy pointer (gitignored). Set to the installed CT folder for live CONFIRM.
Compatibility rows, 'targets ... client (version X)' line, mods\<version>\ folder examples, and footer.
Header '(EU 2.3.0.1)' + manual-install mods\<version>\ folder examples (EN + UK).
NO CHANGE: the installer auto-detects the client version by parsing the install's version.xml at runtime; the 2.3.0.1 strings there are comment examples only.

vendor_refresh.detail: OpenWG 1.1.6 confirmed to LOAD on CT 2.3.1.0 #901 in the prior live CONFIRM (no init-terminate). Keep 1.1.6 unless a build explicitly targeting 2.3.1 is published; re-bundle it in installer/vendor/.

SOFT dependency. MSA 1.7.0 did NOT load on CT 2.3.1.0 in the prior CONFIRM (widget still mounts; only this mod's own settings panel is absent). Check izeberg for a 2.3.1-compatible MSA build before public release; not a blocker for the upgrade.
